creator: didier.castellacci@yahoo.fr
text:
Hello,

I'm on FreeBSD version 12.1-RELEASE-p3

I installed brasero version brasero-3.12.2 by the ports
: sysutils / brasero

the compilation went well.

I just have an example problem
I launch brasero, I go to the tools menu, I click on blank, and in select a disk: 'no disc available'

I added a DVD and the message is still select a disk: 'no disc available'

I don't understand where the problem comes from.

I burned a DVD with cdrecord everything works.

Do you have an idea

Thank you so much
Didier
